reservations.reservation: Panel Runner v0 is scaffolding only; automated multi-provider execution is explicitly deferred to a follow-up motion.
mitigation: Keep panel-run.mjs free of API calls and secrets.
Require a later motion to add execution + selection emission.
reservations.what_to_watch: Any attempt to embed provider keys, call remote models, or treat unscored candidates as canon.

votes.rationale: Ratify the panel slots + selector rubric + selection record workspace as the durable foundation for future automation.
Spec-first approach prevents premature coupling; rubric + selection record forces defensible choices.
Unanimous consent is satisfied; scope is safe (config + scaffolding) and reversible.
